calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-104 Surprise-Gated Volatility Interrupt (committed-only fix)
items.description: MECH-104: Surprise-Gated Volatility Interrupt (committed-only fix). Restricts both interrupt policies to committed steps only, breaking EXQ-062 positive feedback loop.

items.title: SD-005 Latent Information Separation Probe (design fix)
items.description: SD-005: Latent Information Separation Probe (design fix). Round-robin action assignment + binary contact probe with balanced sampling + 500 probe steps. Fixes EXQ-047c flaws.
